text:
Once upon a time, in the sleepy town of Willow Creek, lived a little fox who wasn't brave enough to ever actually leave her hole. She spent her days dreaming of grand adventures.

One foggy morning, while peeking out of her nest, she heard someone calling her name. It was a tiny bat fluttering flutteringly near the window.

"Hello?" She squeaked. It was just Little Willow the bat, fluttering around outside. She called back.

"Can I come in? I've got honey!"

Inedible? No problem. She fluttered right in. Little Willow danced onto her wingnut pillow.

"The honey jar sounds divine! I'll just..."

Before she could eat any, Big Bad Wolf appeared, munching hungrily. His eyes widened.

"Don't worry – I don't eat bugs. Have some?

She handed them a tiny dollop.

"You're really sweet. I might try yours sometime?"
